## Data Analyst

Analytical professional with 5 years of experience turning complex datasets into actionable business insights. Skilled in statistical modeling, data visualization, and cross-functional stakeholder communication. Consistently delivered analyses that drove measurable revenue impact.

## Work Experience

### Senior Data Analyst | Shopify
*01/2023 – Present*

- Developed predictive churn model using Python and scikit-learn that identified at-risk merchants with 89% accuracy, enabling retention team to save $4.2M in annual recurring revenue

- Led A/B testing framework redesign that reduced experiment cycle time from 3 weeks to 5 days, enabling product teams to run 4x more experiments per quarter
- Automated weekly reporting pipeline using Airflow and dbt, eliminating 15 hours of manual data preparation per week across the analytics team

### Data Analyst | HubSpot
*06/2020 – 12/2022*

- Analyzed customer acquisition funnel data across 500K+ leads, identifying drop-off patterns that informed UX changes resulting in 18% improvement in trial-to-paid conversion
- Created segmentation model for marketing campaigns that improved email open rates by 32% and click-through rates by 24% compared to previous targeting approach
- Designed and maintained data warehouse schema in Snowflake serving 200+ internal users, reducing average query time from 45 seconds to 3 seconds through materialized views

### Junior Data Analyst | Deloitte
*07/2019 – 05/2020*

- Performed statistical analysis on client financial data using R and SQL, delivering insights that supported $50M+ in consulting engagements
- Built interactive Tableau dashboards for 3 Fortune 500 clients, replacing static monthly reports and enabling real-time decision making
- Cleaned and standardized datasets of 10M+ records from disparate sources, improving data quality scores from 72% to 96%
